title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
